name: gable-studio
description: Site-analyzer + constraint-generator + Rhino 8 round-trip for the prototypical gable massing. The web app is zero-build (no npm install needed) — this file only lets Node treat core.js as ESM for the parity test.

scripts.test:v3: node web/v3/test_nsga2.mjs && node web/v3/test_genome.mjs && node web/v3/test_objectives.mjs && node web/v3/test_optimize_integration.mjs && node web/v3/test_forces_extra.mjs && node web/v3/test_spawn.mjs && node web/v3/test_authoring.mjs
scripts.test: node test/parity.mjs && python3 test/parity_check.py && node test/sensitivity.mjs && node test/occlusion.mjs && node test/rad_ref.mjs && python3 test/parity_rad.py && npm run test:v3
